'''Mon Calamari Regiments''' were employed by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. These [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] troops were especially trained for [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] defense, thus they were among the best of the Alliance military units when it came to defense against planetary bombardment. They were often assigned to garrison important [[Star system/Legends|systems]] because of this.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]
